title: stelis beniensis
intro: Stelis beniensis, also known as the Beni Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Bolivia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis beniensis include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Stelis beniensis is often used as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
